title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Teach For India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Teach For India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Teach For India family as a Teacher in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
